metadata.title: David Melara | Strategy and Operations CV - ATS

identity.name: David Melara
identity.headline: Operations Manager | Key Account Manager | Marketing Strategy

profile.summary: Senior professional with experience in operations, key account management, marketing strategy, business development and market intelligence. Skilled in cross-functional coordination, client relationship management, process improvement, commercial planning and revenue protection in service-intensive environments.

page1Experience.role: Senior Key Account Manager / Operations Coordinator
page1Experience.description: Managed key client accounts and coordinated operations between customers, technical production and service delivery. Supported turnaround time control, issue resolution, rework reduction and revenue continuity.

bullets: Implemented consultative sales practices and account segmentation processes.
Improved commercial coordination and alignment for high-value accounts.

page1Experience.description: Led marketing, competitiveness and market intelligence initiatives for organizations in growth stages. Supported strategic planning and institutional alignment.

page2Experience.description: Delivered executive training in strategic negotiation, consumer psychology and market intelligence.

jobs.description: Managed medical territories, professional relationships and technical communication in pharmaceutical markets.
Supported market development, territory management and sustained commercial performance.
